Q6 MCQ Not checked
General Aptitude • CIVIL ENGINEERING • Intermediate • +2 / -0.66
Not attempted

It takes six technicians a total of 10 hour to build a new server from direct, computer, with each working at the same rate. If six technicians starts to build the server at 10 AM, and one technician per hour is added beginning at 4 PM, at what time will the server be completed?

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)
Total amount of work = 60 man-hours
From 10 AM to 4 pm, 6 technicians = 36 – man hours
From 4 PM to 5 PM, 7 technicians = 7 man hours
From 5 PM to 6 PM, 8 technicians = 8 man hours
From 6 PM to 7 PM, 9 technicians = 9 man-hours
Total = 60 man hours

Q7 MCQ Not checked
General Aptitude • CIVIL ENGINEERING • Intermediate • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Choose the missing term to complete the given series
3, 5, 10, 12, 24, 26, 52, ?

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
3 × 1 + 2 = 5
5 × 2 + 0 = 10
10 × 1 + 2 = 12
12 × 2 + 0 = 24
24 × 1 + 2 = 26
26 × 2 + 0 = 52
52 × 1 + 2 = 54

Not attempted

Consider the following Student table:

Which of the following queries gives the list of course having an average marks greater than 75?

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
Select Course_ID, AVG (Marks) FROM student GROUP BY Course_ID HAVING AVG (Marks) > 75.
Give the list of desired Course_Id.

Not attempted

Following is Python like pseudo code of function that takes a number as an argument, and uses a stack S to do processing.

What does the above function do in general?

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)
Here, first while loop convert the integer n into binary representation by storing the bits (0’s and 1’s) in the stack.
Second while loop prints these bits in the order that accurately represents the binary form of n. So, function effectively prints, the binary representation of the integer n.

Q60 MCQ Not checked
Technical • Data Science and artificial Intelligence • +2 / -0.66
Not attempted

Consider the following statements:
S1 : R-square value of 1 indicates a prefect bit while R-squared value of 0 means no explanatory power.
S2 : MSE is insensitive to errors as at does not square the differences.
Which of the following is correct?

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)
• An R-squared value of 1 means the model perfectly explains the variability of the dependent variable and a value of 0 means the model does not explain any variability. So, S1 is correct.
• MSE is sensitive to errors, particularly large ones, because it squares the difference between predicted and actual value. This squaring amplifies the impact of large errors. So, S2 is incorrect.

Q61 MCQ Not checked
Technical • Data Science and artificial Intelligence • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Consider the following statements:
S1 : Greedy Best First Search does not need to keep of prior nodes in its path.
S2 : Greedy Best First Search selects nodes based on their estimated cost to reach the goal, ignoring the cost accumulated so far.
Which of the following is/are true?

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
• Greedy Best First Search only considers the current nodes heuristic value and does not to track the full path of prior nodes. So, S1 is true.
• Greedy Best First Search selects nodes on the heuristic (estimated cost to the goal) ignoring the accumulated path cost so far. So, S2 is true.
